Class Xplane.XEvent.Builder

java.lang.Object
com.google.protobuf.AbstractMessageLite.Builder
com.google.protobuf.AbstractMessage.Builder<Xplane.XEvent.Builder>
com.google.protobuf.GeneratedMessage.Builder<Xplane.XEvent.Builder>
org.tensorflow.proto.profiler.Xplane.XEvent.Builder
All Implemented Interfaces:
Message.Builder, MessageLite.Builder, MessageLiteOrBuilder, MessageOrBuilder, Cloneable, Xplane.XEventOrBuilder
Enclosing class:
Xplane.XEvent
public static final class Xplane.XEvent.Builder extends GeneratedMessage.Builder<Xplane.XEvent.Builder> implements Xplane.XEventOrBuilder
An XEvent is a trace event, optionally annotated with XStats.
Next ID: 6
Protobuf type tensorflow.profiler.XEvent
